breathing.title: Take a deep breath.
lines: You don't have to figure everything out
Just stay here for a moment.

comfort: Right now, nothing is required of you
and you will still be here.
you don't have to face it alone.
You've survived every hard moment before this one.
let this be simple: breathe in, breathe out.
You are just having a hard moment.
This feeling is loud right now,
but it does not get the final word.
Put your hand on your heart.
Feel it beating. You are alive, you are okay.
That's all you need right now.
